record.field: Rental Management: List of Contract Agreement expiring in next 45 days
Alert: Lease Agreements Expiring in 45 Days

field.name: body_html
field.p: I hope this email finds you well.
This is a notification to bring to your attention that the agreements are set to expire within the next 45 days. Agreements list is given in the attachment.
Please review the list and take appropriate actions to ensure timely renewal or address any necessary preparations. If you have any questions or concerns, feel free to reach out.
